input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.3.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.3.5
            TITLE: if the ams detects one or more of the conditions of ev.7.3.4 above, the ams must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.3.5: If the AMS detects one or more of the conditions of EV.7.3.4 above, the AMS must:
EV.7.3.5 If the AMS detects one or more of the conditions of EV.7.3.4 above, the AMS must:  
a. Open the Shutdown Circuit  EV.7.2.2 
b. Turn on the AMS Indicator Light.  The light must stay on until the AMS is reset EV.7.2.3

final_answer: If the AMS detects one or more of the conditions of EV.7.3.4 above, the AMS must: a. Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 b. Turn on the AMS Indicator Light. The light must stay on until the AMS is reset EV.7.2.3
